applicability_notes: torch Tensor.transpose(dim0, dim1) lowers to ttnn.permute with the two dims swapped in the identity ordering, e.g. x.transpose(2,3) -> ttnn.permute(x, (0,1,3,2)). Seen at model call sites as key transposition before attention matmul (key_layer (0,1,3,2)).

placement_observations.size_descriptor: attention key heads [B, nH, S, head_dim] -> [B, nH, head_dim, S]
placement_observations.source: Segformer attention: nlp_create_qkv_heads_segformer(key, memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG) then ttnn.permute(key_layer, (0, 1, 3, 2))
